name: More Like Space
description:
This algorithm is a modulation effect of the chorus/flange/stereo-widening sort. It originates in the VST version of the Minky Starshine instrument, which is also present as a disting NT algorithm (above).

The signal is fed into a number of delays in parallel. The 'Voices' parameter sets the number of delays - a higher number of voices tends to give a lusher sound. The delay time of the delays is each modulated by an LFO.

parameters.name: Level
parameters.description: The gain applied to the effect/wet signal.

parameters.name: Sweep
parameters.description: Sets the amount of modulation of the delay time by the LFO (added to the minimum).

parameters.name: Rate
parameters.description: Sets the LFO speed. Exponential scale from 0.05Hz to 20Hz.

parameters.name: Feedback
parameters.description: Introduces feedback into the delay lines, for sustained echos or deeper flanging effects.

parameters.name: Spread
parameters.description: Controls the amount of phase variance between the LFOs of the voices. E.g. two voices with a spread of 50% gives the classic quadrature phase stereo chorus effect.

parameters.name: Shape
parameters.description: Applies waveshaping to the LFO waveform, which has a corresponding effect on the nature of the pitch alterations induced by the modulation. It's hard to describe exactly how it affects the sound – experiment with it! For classic chorus and flange effects, leave this setting at zero.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.
